team.name: Marcus Johnson
team.bio: With over 15 years in real estate and property management, Marcus leads our property services division with expertise in luxury properties and commercial real estate.

team.name: Sarah Chen
team.bio: Sarah brings 12 years of experience in facility management and maintenance operations. She ensures all our maintenance services meet the highest standards of quality and efficiency.

team.name: Robert Davis
team.bio: Robert has managed thousands of successful moves over his 10-year career. His expertise in logistics and customer service ensures smooth, stress-free moving experiences.

team.name: Emily Wilson
team.bio: Emily coordinates our team of skilled handymen, ensuring prompt and professional service for all home repair and improvement projects.

team.name: Michael Brown
team.bio: Michael ensures every client receives exceptional service throughout their journey with Primer Technologies, from initial contact to ongoing support.
